title: equisetum × intermedium
intro: Equisetum × intermedium, also known as the intermediate horsetail, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Equisetum genus, characterized by its distinctive, hollow, and jointed stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. The health benefits of Equisetum × intermedium include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and promote detoxification, making it a popular natural remedy in herbal medicine. Equisetum × intermedium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal use, with some herbalists recommending it for its potential to support kidney function and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract disorders.
